ios.auto_renewable_subscription_payment_: Auto-renewable subscription. Payment is charged to your Apple Account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. You can manage and cancel your subscription in your Apple account settings.

ios.esim_data_packs_require_an_esim_comp: eSIM data packs require an eSIM-compatible and unlocked device. Availability varies by phone model, carrier, and country. Coverage and speeds vary by region.
ios.esim_installation_steps_can_vary_by_: eSIM installation steps can vary by device. Make sure your iPhone is unlocked and eSIM-compatible before installing. If direct install is unavailable, use the activation details above in Settings > Cellular > Add eSIM.
